text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Phew! I placed. I'm on the scoreboard, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Not half bad, huh? Of course, if I really had my
way...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I would've been the coolest and taken first, no
sweat.
choice_data_list: Let's aim for first place next time.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I would've been the coolest and taken first, no
sweat.
choice_data_list: Let's aim for first place next time.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Well...if you really mean it, I guess I can be a little
more proud of myself.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Haha, all right. I got it. Let's try this again...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I did it, Trainer! And there's plenty more where
that came from!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Hmph... You don't have to tell me that. That's the
plan, obviously!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: This race told me exactly what I'm lackin'!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I know, right?! You can just sit back and
relax now!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
The next race is definitely mine! I'll show ya just
how cool I can be!
